'''lajoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:meanderer|meanderer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meanderer|meanderer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lajoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læjeseth|læjeseth]] || [[word:læjesej|læjesej]] || [[word:læjesesh|læjesesh]] || [[word:læjese|læjese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lajojosoth|lajojosoth]] || [[word:lajojosoj|lajojosoj]] || [[word:lajojososh|lajojososh]] || [[word:lajojoso|lajojoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lajosoth|lajosoth]] || [[word:lajosoj|lajosoj]] || [[word:lajososh|lajososh]] || [[word:lajoso|lajoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lajofsoth|lajofsoth]] || [[word:lajofsoj|lajofsoj]] || [[word:lajofsosh|lajofsosh]] || [[word:lajofsof|lajofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lajosotho|lajosotho]] || [[word:lajosojo|lajosojo]] || [[word:lajososho|lajososho]] || [[word:lajosoko|lajosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lajosoth|lajosoth]] || [[word:lajosoj|lajosoj]] || [[word:lajososh|lajososh]] || [[word:lajoso|lajoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lajosothol|lajosothol]] || [[word:lajosojol|lajosojol]] || [[word:lajososhol|lajososhol]] || [[word:lajosokol|lajosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lajosothotho|lajosothotho]] || [[word:lajosojojo|lajosojojo]] || [[word:lajososhosho|lajososhosho]] || [[word:lajosoko|lajosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lajosothon|lajosothon]] || [[word:lajosojon|lajosojon]] || [[word:lajososhon|lajososhon]] || [[word:lajosokon|lajosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lajosothoro|lajosothoro]] || [[word:lajosojoro|lajosojoro]] || [[word:lajososhoro|lajososhoro]] || [[word:lajosokoro|lajosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
